shellCommands.command:
SERVER_PORT=3000 java -jar target/*.jar &
sleep 5
echo "---- Testing GET / (no name) ----"
curl -s http://localhost:3000/
echo ""
echo "---- Testing GET /?name=Alice ----"
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=Alice"
echo ""
echo "---- Testing GET /?name=%20%20Bob%20%20 (whitespace) ----"
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=%20%20Bob%20%20"
echo ""
echo "---- Testing GET /?name=%20%20%20 (only spaces) ----"
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=%20%20%20"
echo ""
echo "---- Testing SERVER_PORT=4000 ----"
kill $(lsof -ti:3000) 2>/dev/null
SERVER_PORT=4000 java -jar target/*.jar &
sleep 5
curl -s http://localhost:4000/
echo ""
kill $(lsof -ti:4000) 2>/dev/null
